name: Flipr.bet
description: Flipr.bet is an on-chain crypto gaming platform centered around a provably fair coin-flip game. Players pay a small fee to flip, build winning streaks, and compete on leaderboards for shared rewards. Fees fund recurring prize pools, token buybacks, and long-term ecosystem growth, with transparent gameplay secured by blockchain technology and Chainlink VRF for verifiable randomness and trustless outcomes.
